name: get_contract_price_conversion_values
description: Retrieve contract price conversion values for a home, including pricing data and rate information used to convert or calculate electricity costs based on the selected pricing plan or index type (e.g., base rate vs. time-of-use pricing)

home_id.description: The unique identifier of the home for which to retrieve contract price conversion values

index_type.description: The pricing index type for conversion values (e.g., 'base' for base rate pricing, or other pricing plans)
